svg.text: SAS On-Premises to SAS Viya — Hybrid Migration Architecture
Detailed Technical View: Infrastructure, Data Flow, Services, Authentication & Connectivity
SAS/ACCESS Engines — ODBC, JDBC, OLE DB, Bulk Load
Platform LSF | cron | Control-M | SAS Schedule Manager | DI Studio flows
DMZ | VPN Tunnel | ExpressRoute / Direct Connect | TLS 1.2+
SAS Viya Compute Server (local batch) | CAS Worker Nodes
kubectl | Helm Charts | kustomize overlays | cert-manager
CLOUD — SAS Viya 4 on Kubernetes (AWS / Azure / GCP)
Managed Kubernetes (EKS / AKS / GKE) — Ingress Controller (NGINX / Istio)
Cloud Analytic Services (CAS) — In-Memory Analytics Engine
Cloud Data Layer — CAS Data Connectors
Python (saspy, swat) | R (swat) | Java SDK | CLI (sas-viya) | Open API / Swagger
SAS 9 Metadata: TCP 8561 | IOM Workspace: 8591 | CAS Binary: 5570 | CAS HTTP: 8777
Viya REST APIs: HTTPS 443 | OAuth/OIDC: 443 | SCIM Provisioning: 443 | Git SSH: 22
VPN/ExpressRoute: IPSec | Database: ODBC 1521/1433/5432 | Object Storage: HTTPS 443
1. Assess (scan metadata + code) -> 2. Convert (code + data + reports) -> 3. Validate (parallel run) -> 4. Cutover (decommission SAS 9)
Hybrid Model: On-prem K8s runs CAS workers for sensitive data; cloud K8s handles compute scale-out. Connected via VPN/ExpressRoute with shared CASLIB federation.
